//: Deploy @fa/web (Next.js 16) from a pnpm monorepo. Set the Vercel project's Root Directory to apps/web; commands below cd back to the repo root so the whole workspace installs and only @fa/web (plus its workspace deps) is built. Deploy with: `vercel --prod` from apps/web, or `pnpm deploy:web` from the repo root (see root package.json).
//functions: All API routes export `runtime = "nodejs"` and `dynamic = "force-dynamic"` (Inngest, Plaid, Stripe webhooks need a real Node runtime + raw request body). Bump maxDuration for the webhook/agent-dispatch routes that fan out work; the Inngest endpoint can be long-lived while serving steps.
//env: Set these in the Vercel project (Production + Preview). Names mirror the root .env.example — NEVER paste values here; configure them as Vercel Environment Variables / Secrets. Build/runtime split noted per var.
//env.supabase: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY (public, build+runtime); SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY (server-only runtime, used by @fa/db).
//env.stripe: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY (last is public), plus the STRIPE_PRICE_* / STRIPE_COUPON_* ids.
//env.inngest: INNGEST_EVENT_KEY, INNGEST_SIGNING_KEY (server-only; required for the /api/inngest serve handler in production).
//env.notify: EXPO_ACCESS_TOKEN, ONESIGNAL_APP_ID, ONESIGNAL_REST_API_KEY (push); ELEVENLABS_API_KEY, ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID, OPENAI_API_KEY, OPENAI_TTS_VOICE (voice briefing TTS).
//env.observability: NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY, NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_HOST (public); SENTRY_DSN, SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN (build-time source-map upload + runtime).
